name: Product Name
description_placeholder: Enter the product description. Use the AI-generated button to generate an intelligent description.
product_link: Add external links for the product, including posts and advertising campaigns on Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok (press Enter after each entry to add them to the list).
delete_text: Warning: This action is irreversible; deleting this product will result in the loss of all related data.
command_text: Used when the assistant doesn't respond to the first message. It must start with / followed by the command name. Example: /Bottle
